summary: Deliverable is broken and incomplete. Workflow references missing SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1 (~line 17-19) and fixtures/secrets.json (env CONFIG_PATH line 13)—workflow cannot execute. Also: actions/checkout@v4 (workflow line 13) is not SHA-pinned (critical security best practice). Core scripts well-written with Set-StrictMode and proper validation, but deliverable fails to meet requirements.
